race.comment: Former Victorian GRATIFICATION (13) has been right there in all three runs since joining the new stable and looks to be working up to a maiden victory. Drops back slightly in trip following a bit of a freshen up and will prove tough to hold out. LUKE SKYWALKER (9) just missed the frame in town last time out and is sure to appreciate the drop back in company here. Capable of a strong showing. TOP LEVEL (12) has placed two of three around this circuit and is usually about the money. In the mix. REVANTAS (6) will be ready to peak now third-up from the break and gets some weight relief with the claim. Top-three candidate. The well-related JADDAF (2) (half to G1 winner Chain Of Lightning) rounds out the selections.
